title: Acciones básicas · Useful verbs and descriptions
focus: High-frequency A1 verbs, simple adjectives and phrases for describing daily needs and actions.

words.example: La necesidad es importante para hablar de abstract.
words.example_en: Need is important for talking about abstract.

words.example: Hay un deseo cerca de aquí.
words.example_en: There is wish; desire near here.

words.example: El gusto personal es importante para hablar de opinion.
words.example_en: Personal taste is important for talking about opinion.

words.example: La preferencia es importante para hablar de opinion.
words.example_en: Preference is important for talking about opinion.

words.example: La opción simple es importante para hablar de opinion.
words.example_en: Simple option is important for talking about opinion.

words.example: Hay una cosa importante cerca de aquí.
words.example_en: There is important thing near here.

words.example: Busco un momento difícil para la clase.
words.example_en: I am looking for difficult moment for class.

words.example: Compré un día libre esta mañana.
words.example_en: I bought day off this morning.

words.example: Necesito una hora libre para hoy.
words.example_en: I need free hour for today.

words.example: Hay un plan fácil cerca de aquí.
words.example_en: There is easy plan near here.

words.example: Busco una tarea sencilla para la clase.

words.example: El trabajo fácil es importante para hablar de work.

words.example: El problema pequeño es importante para hablar de abstract.
words.example_en: Small problem is important for talking about abstract.

words.example: La pregunta sencilla es importante para hablar de communication.
words.example_en: Simple question is important for talking about communication.

words.example: La respuesta corta es importante para hablar de communication.

words.example: La conversación básica es importante para hablar de communication.

words.example: La voz alta es importante para hablar de communication.
words.example_en: Loud voice is important for talking about communication.

words.example: La voz baja es importante para hablar de communication.
words.example_en: Quiet voice is important for talking about communication.

words.example: Busco un ruido fuerte para la clase.
words.example_en: I am looking for loud noise for class.

words.example: El silencio es importante para hablar de communication.
words.example_en: Silence is important for talking about communication.

words.example: Necesito una luz natural para hoy.
words.example_en: I need natural light for today.

words.example: Hay una luz artificial cerca de aquí.
words.example_en: There is artificial light near here.

words.example: Busco un aire fresco para la clase.
words.example_en: I am looking for fresh air for class.

words.example: Compré una agua fría esta mañana.
words.example_en: I bought cold water this morning.

words.example: Necesito una agua caliente para hoy.
words.example_en: I need hot water for today.

words.example: Hay una ducha rápida cerca de aquí.
words.example_en: There is quick shower near here.

words.example: Busco un paseo corto para la clase.
words.example_en: I am looking for short walk for class.

words.example: Compré una visita breve esta mañana.
words.example_en: I bought brief visit this morning.

words.example: La llamada corta es importante para hablar de communication.
words.example_en: Short call is important for talking about communication.

words.example: El mensaje corto es importante para hablar de communication.
words.example_en: Short message is important for talking about communication.

words.example: Busco una lista de compras para la clase.
words.example_en: I am looking for shopping list for class.

words.example: Compré una bolsa reutilizable esta mañana.
words.example_en: I bought reusable bag this morning.

words.example: Necesito un producto fresco para hoy.
words.example_en: I need fresh product for today.

words.example: Hay una fruta madura cerca de aquí.
words.example_en: There is ripe fruit near here.

words.example: Busco una verdura fresca para la clase.
words.example_en: I am looking for fresh vegetable for class.

words.example: Compré un pan integral esta mañana.
words.example_en: I bought wholemeal bread this morning.

words.example: Necesito una leche entera para hoy.
words.example_en: I need whole milk for today.

words.example: Hay una leche desnatada cerca de aquí.
words.example_en: There is skimmed milk near here.

words.example: Busco una comida rápida para la clase.
words.example_en: I am looking for fast food for class.

words.example: La comida sana es importante para hablar de health.
words.example_en: Healthy food is important for talking about health.

words.example: Intento acompañar con más naturalidad.
words.example_en: I try to accompany more naturally.

words.example: Tenemos que ahorrar un poco antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to save a little before deciding.

words.example: Es útil añadir en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: It is useful to add in real situations.

words.example: Aprendí a apagar el móvil poco a poco.
words.example_en: I learned to turn off the mobile phone little by little.

words.example: Es útil beber agua en situaciones reales.

words.example_en: I learned to change one's mind little by little.

words.example_en: I try to share a table more naturally.

words.example: Tenemos que conducir despacio antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to drive slowly before deciding.

words.example: Es útil cuidar la casa en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: It is useful to take care of the house in real situations.

words.example: Aprendí a decidir rápido poco a poco.
words.example_en: I learned to decide quickly little by little.

words.example_en: I try to leave a message more naturally.

words.example: Tenemos que descansar bien antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to rest well before deciding.

words.example_en: It is useful to draw in real situations.

words.example_en: I learned to take a nap little by little.

words.example: Intento ducharse rápido con más naturalidad.
words.example_en: I try to shower quickly more naturally.

words.example_en: We have to send a message before deciding.

words.example_en: It is useful to explain slowly in real situations.

words.example: Aprendí a guardar silencio poco a poco.
words.example_en: I learned to keep silent little by little.

words.example: Intento gastar poco con más naturalidad.
words.example_en: I try to spend little more naturally.

words.example: Tenemos que hablar claro antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to speak clearly before deciding.

words.example: Es útil intentar de nuevo en situaciones reales.

words.example_en: I learned to read aloud little by little.

words.example: Intento llamar por teléfono con más naturalidad.

words.example_en: It is useful to look around in real situations.

words.example: Intento pagar la cuenta con más naturalidad.
words.example_en: I try to pay the bill more naturally.

words.example: Tenemos que pasar tiempo antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to spend time before deciding.

words.example: Es útil preguntar algo en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: It is useful to ask something in real situations.

words.example: Aprendí a recibir ayuda poco a poco.
words.example_en: I learned to receive help little by little.

words.example: Intento rechazar con educación con más naturalidad.
words.example_en: I try to refuse politely more naturally.

words.example: Tenemos que recordar una palabra antes de decidir.
words.example_en: We have to remember a word before deciding.

words.example: Es útil repetir la frase en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: It is useful to repeat the sentence in real situations.

words.example: Aprendí a reservar habitación poco a poco.
words.example_en: I learned to book a room little by little.

words.example: Intento volver a casa con más naturalidad.
words.example_en: I try to return home more naturally.

words.example: La situación es bastante actual.
words.example_en: The situation is quite current.

words.example: Es un tema antiguo de verdad para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a really old topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción básico.
words.example_en: It seems like a basic option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante breve.
words.example_en: The situation is quite brief.

words.example: Es un tema completo para empezar para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a complete for beginners topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción diario.
words.example_en: It seems like a daily option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante diferente de antes.
words.example_en: The situation is quite different from before.

words.example: Es un tema fácil de entender para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a easy to understand topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción fuerte de sabor.
words.example_en: It seems like a strong in flavour option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante joven todavía.
words.example_en: The situation is quite still young.

words.example_en: It is a necessary for living topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción normal para mí.
words.example_en: It seems like a normal for me option to me.

words.example: Me parece una opción posible hoy.
words.example_en: It seems like a possible today option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante tranquilo para estudiar.
words.example_en: The situation is quite quiet for studying.

words.example: Lo explico despacio cuando puedo.
words.example_en: I explain it slowly when I can.

words.example: La situación cambia temprano por la mañana.
words.example_en: The situation changes early in the morning.

words.example: Responde tarde por la noche en la entrevista.
words.example_en: He or she answers late at night in the interview.
